rationale.D1: Confirmed: one Shooter subsystem (SubsystemBase) owns REV SparkFlex motors directly with no IO interface or hardware abstraction layer; RobotBuilder-generated command-based baseline, no *IO interfaces present anywhere.
rationale.D2: Confirmed: three commands (Shoot, RevUp, Pivot) with button bindings in RobotContainer; no state machine, no Superstructure coordinator, no goal-request API — pure command composition baseline.
rationale.D3: Confirmed: Shooter.SimulationPeriodic() is an empty auto-generated stub; build.gradle sets includeDesktopSupport=false; no physics classes (ElevatorSim, FlywheelSim, etc.) used anywhere.
rationale.D4: Confirmed: src/test/cpp/main.cpp is the GradleRIO boilerplate test harness with no test cases at all — just HAL_Initialize and RUN_ALL_TESTS with nothing registered.
rationale.D5: Confirmed: Robot.cpp RobotPeriodic() calls SmartDashboard.PutNumber for 5 motor values; this is scattered dashboard output, not structured logging — no DogLog, Epilogue, or AdvantageKit.
rationale.D6: Confirmed: no PathPlanner or Choreo files in deploy/, no AutoBuilder or trajectory following; autonomous chooser exists in RobotContainer but nothing is added to it — no auto paths at all.
rationale.D7: Confirmed: no vision imports, no LimelightHelpers, no PhotonCamera, no addVisionMeasurement anywhere; only REVLib and WPILibNewCommands in vendordeps.
rationale.D8: Confirmed: 2022 rapid-react repo has a real README with build/deploy context; 2024 repo has no README; no CI workflows (.yml absent); no formatter; RobotBuilder-generated structure counts as basic hygiene floor.

D1: src/main/include/subsystems/Shooter.h:28 — class Shooter: public frc2::SubsystemBase with public motor fields, no IO interface
src/main/cpp/Robot.cpp:36 — directly accesses m_container->m_shooter.m_motorController1 in RobotPeriodic
D2: src/main/cpp/RobotContainer.cpp:55 — button bindings wire JoystickButton to Shoot/RevUp/Pivot commands; no coordinator
src/main/cpp/commands/Shoot.cpp:37 — Execute() sets motor directly; no state enum or FSM
D3: src/main/cpp/subsystems/Shooter.cpp:74 — SimulationPeriodic() body is empty comment only
D4: src/test/cpp/main.cpp:1 — GradleRIO boilerplate; no TEST() or TEST_F() cases present
D5: src/main/cpp/Robot.cpp:36 — SmartDashboard::PutNumber called 5 times for motor voltages/positions; no structured logging
D6: src/main/deploy/example.txt:1 — deploy directory contains only example.txt; no .path, .auto, or .traj files
vendordeps/ — only REVLib.json and WPILibNewCommands.json; no PathPlannerLib or Choreo vendordep
D7: vendordeps/ — REVLib.json and WPILibNewCommands.json only; no PhotonVision or Limelight vendordep
D8: frc_team_repos/4419-team-rewind/2022/rapid-react/README.md:1 — real README with build/deploy context for 2022 season
